description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image and a global before_script that runs `mix local.rebar --force`, `mix local.hex --force` and `mix deps.get` for every job. Define a build stage with a job named build that sets the variable MIX_ENV to prod, executes `mix release`, and stores all tar.gz files under `_build/prod/rel/gameserver/releases/**/*.tar.gz` as artifacts. Add a test stage with a job named test that runs `mix test`. No caches, services, or deployment targets are configured, and the test job uses the default test stage.
